---
title: Customer-Base Analytics
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
---

A research library of **customer-base analytics** models — the "buy-till-you-die"
(BTYD) / probability-modelling tradition of Fader, Hardie, and related work.
Each page below is a self-contained essay mixing mathematical exposition with
executable Python.

## Pages

### Models

#### Acquisition & New-Product Forecasting

- [Depth-of-Repeat Model — Forecasting Aggregate Repeat-Buying](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/acquisition/depth-of-repeat)
- [Sales Forecast — Finite Mixture Model with Beta-Geometric Distribution](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/acquisition/finite-mixture-bg-sales-forecast)
- [A Dynamic Changepoint Model for New Product Sales Forecasting](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/acquisition/dynamic-changepoint-new-product)

#### Retention (Contractual / Discrete-Time)

- [Beta-Geometric (BG) Model](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/retention/beta-geometric)
- [Beta-discrete-Weibull (BdW) Model](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/retention/beta-discrete-weibull)
- [Discrete-Time, Contractual Setting Retention Model](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/retention/subscription-retention)

#### Repeat Purchasing (Noncontractual)

- [NBD Model Variants — Overview](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/purchasing/nbd-overview)
- [BG/NBD Model](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/purchasing/bg-nbd)
- [BG/NBD Model — Stan Implementation](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/purchasing/bg-nbd-stan)
- [NBD/OTB Model — NBD with One-Time Buyers](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/purchasing/nbd-otb)
- [BG/BB Model — Discrete-Time, Noncontractual Setting](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/purchasing/bg-bb)
- [Pareto/NBD Model (WIP)](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/purchasing/pareto-nbd)

#### Spend / Monetary Value

- [Gamma-Gamma Model of Monetary Value](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/spend/gamma-gamma)

#### Combined CLV

- [RFM and CLV: Using Iso-Value Curves for Customer Base Analysis](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/models/clv/rfm-and-clv)

### Customer-Base Auditing & Analyses

- [The Customer-Base Audit](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/analyses/customer-base-audit)
- [Analysing Buyer Behaviour Using Consumer Panel Data](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/analyses/buyer-behavior-summary-panel-data)
- [Analysing Buyer Behaviour Using Transaction Logs](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/analyses/buyer-behavior-summary-transaction-log)
- [Calculating Customer Acquisition Cost](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/analyses/customer-acquisition-cost)
- [RFM: Recency, Frequency, Monetary Value Summary](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/analyses/rfm-summary)
- [Estimating Concentration in Champagne Purchasing](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/analyses/estimating-purchasing-concentration)

### Customer-Based Corporate Valuation (CBCV)

- [Customer-Based Corporate Valuation for Subscription-Based Businesses](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/valuation/cbcv-subscription-based)

### Data Preparation

- [CDNOW Data Set & Summaries](https://abdullahau.github.io/customer-analytics/notebooks/data-prep/cdnow-dataset)

## Source Files

GitHub repository: [https://github.com/abdullahau/customer-analytics](https://github.com/abdullahau/customer-analytics)
